skills.name: Capote
skills.description: Threaten nearby enemies into chasing you. If there is a boss monster in the vicinity, the boss monster will be threatened first. Reduces the Critical Resistance of threatened enemies. If the target is a monster, its movement speed increases, and it becomes immune to forced threat skills for 30 seconds.
skills.effect_text:
Reduces Critical Resistance of threatened targets by CaptionRatio2 %
Threatened Targets: 10
Capote Debuff Duration: CaptionRatio seconds

skills.name: Muleta
skills.description: Take out your cape and fight back against an enemy that attacks you. If the counterattacked enemy is a Beast type, it attacks first and receives [SeeRed] debuff. A successful counterattack nullifies the damage received and increases damage against large and boss monsters for a certain amount of time. Blocks all melee physical attacks while counterattacking.
skills.effect_text:
Counterattack Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 3
Counterattack Duration: 2 seconds
Increases damage to large, boss monsters by CaptionRatio2 % when counterattack is successful

skills.name: Faena
skills.description: Attack enemies in front of you rapidly with a rapier. Increases damage against large, boss monsters by 20%. Critical Hit on enemies under [SeeRed]. Faena applies with an increased rate of Critical Attack by 50% when the attack is accurately hit.
skills.effect_text:
Skill factor: SkillFactor % x 8
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Ole
skills.description: Threat Value against the caster increases by flapping the cape and drawing attention from monsters.
skills.effect_text:
Threat Value increases by 1% of [Maximum ATK]
005060Constantly applied after learning the skill/
Minimum Critical Rate of Matador skill increases by CaptionRatio2 %

skills.name: Paso Doble
skills.description: Rotate 360 degrees and attack enemies around you. Enemies struck are knocked down.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 4
AoE Attack Ratio: SkillSR

skills.name: Back Slide
skills.description: Move back a certain distance. No damage from the enemy while Back Slide is used, decreases damage received by 30% after using the Back Slide.
skills.effect_text:
Evades enemy attacks during Backslide
Decreases damage received by 30% for 3 seconds after using the skill

skills.name: Corrida Finale
skills.description: Incite a fighting bull to attack nearby enemies. The provoked bull deals damage to enemies in its way. Increases damage against large, boss monsters by 20%.
skills.effect_text:
Skill Factor: SkillFactor % x 6
Targets: CaptionRatio

attributes.name: Muleta: Counterattack Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Muleta] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Faena: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Faena] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Paso Doble: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Paso Doble] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Muleta: Counterattack Master
attributes.description:
* Removes attack type restrictions for counterattack

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Picador
attributes.description:
* Inflicts 5 seconds of Bleeding when attacking large, boss monster

* If the enemy is a character, Bleeding is inflicted when the target is under the Forced Threat debuff

attributes.name: Banderillero
attributes.description:
* Increases Matador skill damage by 75% when attacking Large or Boss monster

* If the target is a character, increases damage to enemies with the Forced Threat debuff

attributes.name: Paso Doble: Remove Knockdown
attributes.description:
* Removes Knockdown of [Paso Doble]

Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Corrida Finale: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases the skill factor of [Corrida Finale] by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: Corrida Finale: Encore
attributes.description:
* Conjures another bull from the back after the first [Corrida Finale]

* Increases SP consumption by 50%

attributes.name: Muleta: Showtime
attributes.description:
* Reduces the cooldown of all Matador skills (except Muleta) by 1 sec per attribute level when [Muleta]'s counterattack is successful

* Increases SP consumption by 10%

attributes.name: Back Slide: Perfect Timing
attributes.description:
* Resets the cooldown of Paso Doble when an enemy attack is evaded with [Black Slide]

* Increases SP consumption by 20%

attributes.name: Capote: Enhance
attributes.description:
Increases Critical Resistance decrease effect of [Capote] by 0.5% per attribute level

* Additional 10% increases at maximum level

attributes.name: Ole: Enhance
attributes.description:
* Increases [Ole]'s minimum critical rate increasing effects by 0.5% per attribute level

* +10% added increase at maximum level

attributes.name: [Arts] Corrida Finale: Raging Bull
attributes.description: * Adds the [Fire] property to [Corrida Finale], and it deals continous Fire damage in the area for 5 seconds.

attributes.name: [Arts] Muleta: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Muleta] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Faena: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Faena] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Paso Doble: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Paso Doble] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Corrida Finale: Enhanced Upgrade
attributes.description: * Increases the Skill Factor of [Corrida Finale] by 1.25% per attribute level

attributes.name: [Arts] Muleta: Faena
attributes.description:
* Activates [Faena] at the skill level you’ve learned when succeeding in counterattack by [Muleta]

* [Faena] skill deactivates when [Faena] skill is not learned

* Increases cooldown by 20 seconds
